notableEvents.label: Error-aided run(s) allowed
notableEvents.detail: Greg Jones steals (1) 2nd base. Luis Rengifo scores. Greg Jones to 3rd. Throwing error by catcher Agustín Ramírez.

notableEvents.label: Pickoff
notableEvents.detail: Pitcher Abner Uribe picks off Javier Sanoja at 1st on throw to first baseman Jake Bauers.

notableEvents.label: Error-aided run(s) allowed
notableEvents.detail: Luis Rengifo reaches on a fielder's choice. Brice Turang scores. Joey Ortiz to 3rd. Jake Bauers to 2nd. Missed catch error by catcher Agustín Ramírez, assist to second baseman Xavier Edwards.

notableEvents.label: Wild pitch run(s)
notableEvents.detail: Wild pitch by pitcher Trevor Megill. Jakob Marsee scores.

notableEvents.label: Cycle game
notableEvents.detail: Team hit a single, double, triple, and home run

notableEvents.label: William Contreras GIDP
notableEvents.detail: William Contreras grounds into a double play, first baseman Connor Norby to second baseman Xavier Edwards. Sal Frelick out at 2nd. William Contreras out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Stolen base
notableEvents.detail: Jake Bauers steals (3) 3rd base. Luis Rengifo steals (1) 2nd base.

notableEvents.label: Luis Rengifo plunked
notableEvents.detail: Luis Rengifo hit by pitch. Gary Sánchez to 3rd. Jake Bauers to 2nd.
